Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers at the top of the rankings. CLMT (rank 1, score 95.0) shows explosive intermediate-term momentum with 151% one-year returns and 532% five-year returns, though its 10-year performance of 118% lags significantly behind its 5-year trajectory, suggesting more recent outperformance. LINC (rank 2) demonstrates even more dramatic long-term strength with 1,190% ten-year returns and maintains outperformance versus SPY across all timeframes (1y: +137%, 5y: +434%, 10y: +956%), indicating sustained multi-decade momentum. However, CLMT shows a concerning divergence with negative 10-year relative performance versus SPY (-115%) and QQQ (-353%), suggesting it was a weak performer historically before its recent surge. Both securities pass all simple moving average filters and exhibit "clean" momentum signals with normal volatility, though CLMT's ratio_passes score of 4 versus LINC's 3 indicates more consistent momentum acceleration across timeframes.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
